---
title: "thesis"
author: "Tala Mansour"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(Matching)
```

##EDA & Data cleaning

```{r}
#Data
data(lalonde)
Y <- lalonde$re78
D <- lalonde$treat
n <- length(Y)
p_hat <- mean(D)

cat("n:", n, "\n")
cat("n treated:", sum(D==1), "\n")
cat("n control:", sum(D==0), "\n")
cat("p_hat:", round(p_hat, 3), "\n")
cat("Mean Y treated:", round(mean(Y[D==1]), 3), "\n")
cat("Mean Y control:", round(mean(Y[D==0]), 3), "\n")
cat("Raw mean diff: ", round(mean(Y[D==1]) - mean(Y[D==0]), 3), "\n")

# --- Discretize covariates ---
lalonde$age_cat <- cut(lalonde$age,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, 24, 34, Inf),
                       labels = c("young", "middle", "older"))

lalonde$educ_cat <- cut(lalonde$educ,
                        breaks = c(-Inf, 8, 12, Inf),
                        labels = c("less_than_hs", "hs", "above_hs"))

lalonde$re74_cat <- cut(lalonde$re74,
                        breaks = c(-Inf, 0, median(lalonde$re74[lalonde$re74 > 0]), Inf),
                        labels = c("zero", "low", "high"))

lalonde$re75_cat <- cut(lalonde$re75,
                        breaks = c(-Inf, 0, median(lalonde$re75[lalonde$re75 > 0]), Inf),
                        labels = c("zero", "low", "high"))

X <- model.matrix(~ age_cat + educ_cat + re74_cat + re75_cat +
                    black + hisp + married + nodegr - 1,
                  data = lalonde)

cat("\nCovariate matrix dimensions:", dim(X), "\n")
print(colnames(X))
```
## FWL Resuidualization
```{r}
# --- FWL Residualization ---
MX        <- diag(n) - X %*% solve(t(X) %*% X) %*% t(X)
W         <- MX %*% D
R         <- MX %*% Y
beta_long <- sum(W * R) / sum(W^2)
r_hat     <- R - beta_long * W

cat("beta_long:", round(beta_long, 3), "\n")
cat("mean W (should be ~0):", round(mean(W), 6), "\n")
cat("mean R (should be ~0):", round(mean(R), 6), "\n\n")

E_W2   <- mean(W^2)
E_r2   <- mean(r_hat^2)
E_W2r2 <- mean(W^2 * r_hat^2)
tau2   <- E_W2r2 / (E_W2 * E_r2)

sigma2_1 <- mean(r_hat[D==1]^2)
sigma2_0 <- mean(r_hat[D==0]^2)

cat("E[W^2]:   ", round(E_W2, 6), "\n")
cat("E[r^2]:   ", round(E_r2, 3), "\n")
cat("E[W^2r^2]:", round(E_W2r2, 3), "\n")
cat("tau^2:    ", round(tau2, 4), "\n\n")
cat("sigma^2_1:", round(sigma2_1, 3), "\n")
cat("sigma^2_0:", round(sigma2_0, 3), "\n\n")
```
## Permutation test
```{r}
# --- Permutation Test ---
T_obs     <- sum(W * R) / sqrt(n)
Omega_hat <- mean(W^2 * r_hat^2)
S_obs     <- T_obs / sqrt(Omega_hat)

set.seed(123)
B       <- 1000
T_perm  <- numeric(B)
S_perm  <- numeric(B)

for(b in 1:B){
  perm       <- sample(1:n)
  R_perm     <- R[perm]
  T_perm[b]  <- sum(W * R_perm) / sqrt(n)
  beta_perm  <- sum(W * R_perm) / sum(W^2)
  r_perm     <- R_perm - beta_perm * W
  Omega_perm <- mean(W^2 * r_perm^2)
  S_perm[b]  <- T_perm[b] / sqrt(Omega_perm)
}

p_T <- mean(T_perm >= T_obs)
p_S <- mean(S_perm >= S_obs)

cat("T_obs:", round(T_obs, 4), "\n")
cat("S_obs:", round(S_obs, 4), "\n\n")
cat("Unstudentized p-value:", round(p_T, 3), "\n")
cat("Studentized p-value:  ", round(p_S, 3), "\n")
```
```{r}
alpha <- 0.05
z_a   <- qnorm(0.95)
z_b   <- qnorm(0.80)

pow_studentized   <- 1 - pnorm(z_a - beta_long * p_hat*(1-p_hat) /
                                  sqrt(E_W2r2 / n))
pow_standard      <- 1 - pnorm((z_a * sqrt(E_W2 * E_r2) -
                                  beta_long * p_hat*(1-p_hat)*sqrt(n)) /
                                 sqrt(E_W2r2))

mde_studentized   <- (z_a + z_b) * sqrt(E_W2r2) / (p_hat * (1-p_hat) * sqrt(n))
mde_standard      <- (z_a * sqrt(E_W2 * E_r2) + z_b * sqrt(E_W2r2)) /
                       (p_hat * (1-p_hat) * sqrt(n))

n_studentized     <- (z_a + z_b)^2 * E_W2r2 / (beta_long * p_hat * (1-p_hat))^2
n_standard        <- ((z_a * sqrt(E_W2 * E_r2) + z_b * sqrt(E_W2r2)) /
                        (beta_long * p_hat * (1-p_hat)))^2

lalonde_pow_diff  <- pow_standard - pow_studentized

cat("Power studentized:   ", round(pow_studentized, 4), "\n")
cat("Power standard:      ", round(pow_standard, 4), "\n")
cat("MDE studentized:     ", round(mde_studentized, 0), "\n")
cat("MDE standard:        ", round(mde_standard, 0), "\n")
cat("n* studentized:      ", round(n_studentized, 0), "\n")
cat("n* standard:         ", round(n_standard, 0), "\n")
```

## LaLonde distribution plot
```{r}
# --- LaLonde Distribution Plot ---
set.seed(123)
B <- 2000
T_perm_lalonde <- numeric(B)

for(b in 1:B){
  perm              <- sample(1:n)
  R_perm            <- R[perm]
  T_perm_lalonde[b] <- sum(W * R_perm) / sqrt(n)
}

sd_rand_l  <- sd(T_perm_lalonde)
sd_true_l  <- sqrt(E_W2r2)
cv_perm_l  <- quantile(T_perm_lalonde, 0.95)
rej_prob_l <- 1 - pnorm(cv_perm_l, mean = 0, sd = sd_true_l)

cat("LaLonde tau^2:", round(tau2, 4), "\n")
cat("SD permutation:", round(sd_rand_l, 3), "\n")
cat("SD true:       ", round(sd_true_l, 3), "\n")
cat("CV permutation:", round(cv_perm_l, 3), "\n")
cat("Actual Type I error:", round(rej_prob_l, 3), "\n")

x_seq_l <- seq(-12000, 12000, length.out = 2000)
d_perm_l <- dnorm(x_seq_l, mean = 0, sd = sd_rand_l)
d_true_l <- dnorm(x_seq_l, mean = 0, sd = sd_true_l)

plot_df_l <- data.frame(
  x    = rep(x_seq_l, 2),
  y    = c(d_perm_l, d_true_l),
  type = rep(c("Randomization distribution", "True asymptotic distribution (H0)"),
             each = length(x_seq_l))
)

shade_df_l <- data.frame(
  x = x_seq_l[x_seq_l >= cv_perm_l],
  y = dnorm(x_seq_l[x_seq_l >= cv_perm_l], mean = 0, sd = sd_true_l)
)

lalondeTau <- ggplot() +
  geom_area(data = shade_df_l, aes(x = x, y = y),
            fill = "#3498DB", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = plot_df_l, aes(x = x, y = y, color = type),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cv_perm_l,
             color = "orange", linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm_l + 300, y = max(d_perm_l) * 0.85,
           label = paste0("CV = ", round(cv_perm_l, 0)),
           color = "orange", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm_l + 300, y = max(d_perm_l) * 0.6,
           label = paste0("Type I error = ", round(rej_prob_l, 3)),
           color = "#3498DB", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Randomization distribution" = "orange",
                                 "True asymptotic distribution (H0)" = "#3498DB"),
                     name = NULL) +
  labs(title = expression("Randomization vs Asymptotic Distribution, " ~
                          tau^2 ~ "= 1.048"),
       x = expression(T[n]), y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
ggsave("fig_ch4_lalonde.pdf", plot = lalondeTau, width = 8, height = 5)
lalondeTau
```
## scenarios
```{r}
# --- Simulated Scenarios: tau^2 > 1 (p=0.1, sigma1/sigma0=2) ---
set.seed(42)
n_sim  <- 2000
p_sim  <- 0.1

sigma0_sim <- E_r2 / (p_sim * 2 + (1 - p_sim))
sigma1_sim <- 2 * sigma0_sim

D_sim <- rbinom(n_sim, 1, p_sim)
r_sim <- ifelse(D_sim == 1,
                rnorm(n_sim, 0, sqrt(sigma1_sim)),
                rnorm(n_sim, 0, sqrt(sigma0_sim)))

Y_sim        <- beta_long * D_sim + r_sim
W_sim        <- D_sim - p_sim
R_sim        <- Y_sim - mean(Y_sim)
beta_sim_est <- sum(W_sim * R_sim) / sum(W_sim^2)
r_hat_sim    <- R_sim - beta_sim_est * W_sim

E_W2_sim   <- mean(W_sim^2)
E_r2_sim   <- mean(r_hat_sim^2)
E_W2r2_sim <- mean(W_sim^2 * r_hat_sim^2)
tau2_sim   <- E_W2r2_sim / (E_W2_sim * E_r2_sim)

set.seed(123)
B <- 2000
T_perm_sim <- numeric(B)

for(b in 1:B){
  perm          <- sample(1:n_sim)
  R_perm        <- R_sim[perm]
  T_perm_sim[b] <- sum(W_sim * R_perm) / sqrt(n_sim)
}

cv_perm   <- quantile(T_perm_sim, 0.95)
sd_true   <- sqrt(E_W2r2_sim)
sd_rand   <- sd(T_perm_sim)
rej_prob  <- 1 - pnorm(cv_perm, mean = 0, sd = sd_true)

cat("tau^2:", round(tau2_sim, 4), "\n")
cat("CV from permutation:", round(cv_perm, 3), "\n")
cat("SD true (sampling): ", round(sd_true, 3), "\n")
cat("SD rand (permutation):", round(sd_rand, 3), "\n")
cat("Actual rejection prob:", round(rej_prob, 3), "\n")


x_seq_s1  <- seq(-10000, 12000, length.out = 2000)
d_perm_s1 <- dnorm(x_seq_s1, mean = 0, sd = sd_rand)
d_true_s1 <- dnorm(x_seq_s1, mean = 0, sd = sd_true)

plot_df_s1 <- data.frame(
  x    = rep(x_seq_s1, 2),
  y    = c(d_perm_s1, d_true_s1),
  type = rep(c("Randomization distribution", "True asymptotic distribution (H0)"),
             each = length(x_seq_s1))
)

shade_df_s1 <- data.frame(
  x = x_seq_s1[x_seq_s1 >= cv_perm],
  y = dnorm(x_seq_s1[x_seq_s1 >= cv_perm], mean = 0, sd = sd_true)
)

p_high <- ggplot() +
  geom_area(data = shade_df_s1, aes(x = x, y = y),
            fill = "#3498DB", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = plot_df_s1, aes(x = x, y = y, color = type),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cv_perm,
             color = "orange", linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm + 200, y = max(d_perm_s1) * 0.95,
           label = paste0("CV = ", round(cv_perm, 0)),
           color = "orange", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm + 200, y = max(d_perm_s1) * 0.75,
           label = paste0("Type I error = ", round(rej_prob, 3)),
           color = "#3498DB", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Randomization distribution" = "orange",
                                 "True asymptotic distribution (H0)" = "#3498DB"),
                     name = NULL) +
  labs(title = expression("Randomization vs Asymptotic Distribution," ~
                          tau^2 ~ "= 1.84"),
       x = expression(T[n]), y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p_high
ggsave("fig_ch3_tau_high.pdf", plot = p_high, width = 8, height = 5)
```
## Scenarios
```{r}
# --- Simulated Scenarios: tau^2 < 1 (p=0.1, sigma1/sigma0=0.5) ---
set.seed(42)
n_sim2  <- 2000
p_sim2  <- 0.1

sigma0_sim2 <- E_r2 / (p_sim2 * 0.5 + (1 - p_sim2))
sigma1_sim2 <- 0.5 * sigma0_sim2

D_sim2 <- rbinom(n_sim2, 1, p_sim2)
r_sim2 <- ifelse(D_sim2 == 1,
                 rnorm(n_sim2, 0, sqrt(sigma1_sim2)),
                 rnorm(n_sim2, 0, sqrt(sigma0_sim2)))

Y_sim2     <- beta_long * D_sim2 + r_sim2
W_sim2     <- D_sim2 - p_sim2
R_sim2     <- Y_sim2 - mean(Y_sim2)
beta_sim2  <- sum(W_sim2 * R_sim2) / sum(W_sim2^2)
r_hat_sim2 <- R_sim2 - beta_sim2 * W_sim2

E_W2_sim2   <- mean(W_sim2^2)
E_r2_sim2   <- mean(r_hat_sim2^2)
E_W2r2_sim2 <- mean(W_sim2^2 * r_hat_sim2^2)
tau2_sim2   <- E_W2r2_sim2 / (E_W2_sim2 * E_r2_sim2)

set.seed(123)
T_perm_sim2 <- numeric(B)

for(b in 1:B){
  perm           <- sample(1:n_sim2)
  R_perm         <- R_sim2[perm]
  T_perm_sim2[b] <- sum(W_sim2 * R_perm) / sqrt(n_sim2)
}

sd_rand2  <- sd(T_perm_sim2)
sd_true2  <- sqrt(E_W2r2_sim2)
cv_perm2  <- quantile(T_perm_sim2, 0.95)
rej_prob2 <- 1 - pnorm(cv_perm2, mean = 0, sd = sd_true2)

cat("tau^2:", round(tau2_sim2, 4), "\n")
cat("SD permutation:", round(sd_rand2, 3), "\n")
cat("SD true:       ", round(sd_true2, 3), "\n")
cat("CV permutation:", round(cv_perm2, 3), "\n")
cat("Actual Type I error:", round(rej_prob2, 3), "\n")

x_seq_s2  <- seq(-8000, 10000, length.out = 2000)
d_perm_s2 <- dnorm(x_seq_s2, mean = 0, sd = sd_rand2)
d_true_s2 <- dnorm(x_seq_s2, mean = 0, sd = sd_true2)

plot_df_s2 <- data.frame(
  x    = rep(x_seq_s2, 2),
  y    = c(d_perm_s2, d_true_s2),
  type = rep(c("Randomization distribution", "True asymptotic distribution (H0)"),
             each = length(x_seq_s2))
)

shade_df_s2 <- data.frame(
  x = x_seq_s2[x_seq_s2 >= cv_perm2],
  y = dnorm(x_seq_s2[x_seq_s2 >= cv_perm2], mean = 0, sd = sd_true2)
)

p_low <- ggplot() +
  geom_area(data = shade_df_s2, aes(x = x, y = y),
            fill = "#3498DB", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = plot_df_s2, aes(x = x, y = y, color = type),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = cv_perm2,
             color = "orange", linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm2 + 200, y = max(d_perm_s2) * 0.95,
           label = paste0("CV = ", round(cv_perm2, 0)),
           color = "orange", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  annotate("text", x = cv_perm2 + 200, y = max(d_perm_s2) * 0.75,
           label = paste0("Type I error = ", round(rej_prob2, 3)),
           color = "#3498DB", hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Randomization distribution" = "orange",
                                 "True asymptotic distribution (H0)" = "#3498DB"),
                     name = NULL) +
  labs(title = expression("Randomization vs Asymptotic Distribution," ~
                          tau^2 ~ "= 0.62"),
       x = expression(T[n]), y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p_low
ggsave("fig_ch3_tau_low.pdf", plot = p_low, width = 8, height = 5)
```
## Power distortion curve
```{r}
# --- Power Distortion Curve ---
tau2_seq <- seq(0.3, 2.0, by = 0.01)

pow_studentized_tau <- numeric(length(tau2_seq))
pow_standard_tau    <- numeric(length(tau2_seq))

for(i in seq_along(tau2_seq)){
  tau2_i   <- tau2_seq[i]
  E_W2r2_i <- tau2_i * E_W2 * E_r2
  
  pow_studentized_tau[i] <- 1 - pnorm(z_a - beta_long * p_hat*(1-p_hat) /
                                         sqrt(E_W2r2_i / n))
  pow_standard_tau[i]    <- 1 - pnorm((z_a * sqrt(E_W2 * E_r2) -
                                         beta_long * p_hat*(1-p_hat)*sqrt(n)) /
                                        sqrt(E_W2r2_i))
}

power_diff_tau <- pow_standard_tau - pow_studentized_tau

plot_df <- data.frame(
  tau2     = tau2_seq,
  pow_diff = power_diff_tau
)

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(region = case_when(
    tau2 < 1 ~ "Understates",
    tau2 > 1 ~ "Overstates",
    TRUE     ~ "None"
  ))

tau_sens1 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = tau2, y = pow_diff)) +
  geom_ribbon(data = subset(plot_df, tau2 <= 1),
              aes(ymin = pow_diff, ymax = 0, fill = "Understates"),
              alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_ribbon(data = subset(plot_df, tau2 >= 1),
              aes(ymin = 0, ymax = pow_diff, fill = "Overstates"),
              alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = data.frame(tau2 = tau2, pow_diff = lalonde_pow_diff),
             aes(x = tau2, y = pow_diff, shape = "LaLonde experimental"),
             color = "blue", size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name   = NULL,
    values = c("Understates" = "darkgreen", "Overstates" = "red"),
    labels = c(expression(paste("Overstates power (", tau^2, " > 1)")),
               expression(paste("Understates power (", tau^2, " < 1)")))
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = NULL, values = c("LaLonde experimental" = 19)) +
  guides(fill  = guide_legend(order = 1),
         shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(color = "blue"))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.25, 0.25),
                     labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.3, 2.05)) +
  labs(title = expression("Power Distortion as a Function of " ~ tau^2),
       x     = expression(tau^2),
       y     = "Power difference (unstudentized - studentized)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right")


tau_sens1
##ggsave("fig_ch4_tau_sens.pdf", plot = tau_sens1, width = 8, height = 5)


```
## Scenario table 
```{r}
# --- Sensitivity analysis numbers ---
idx_06  <- which.min(abs(tau2_seq - 0.6))
idx_05  <- which.min(abs(tau2_seq - 0.5))
idx_04  <- which.min(abs(tau2_seq - 0.4))
idx_03  <- which.min(abs(tau2_seq - 0.3))
idx_min <- which.min(power_diff_tau)

cat("tau^2 = 0.6:  power diff =", round(power_diff_tau[idx_06], 4),
    "| correct power =", round(pow_studentized_tau[idx_06], 3),
    "| incorrect power =", round(pow_standard_tau[idx_06], 3), "\n")
cat("tau^2 = 0.5:  power diff =", round(power_diff_tau[idx_05], 4),
    "| correct power =", round(pow_studentized_tau[idx_05], 3),
    "| incorrect power =", round(pow_standard_tau[idx_05], 3), "\n")
cat("tau^2 = 0.4:  power diff =", round(power_diff_tau[idx_04], 4),
    "| correct power =", round(pow_studentized_tau[idx_04], 3),
    "| incorrect power =", round(pow_standard_tau[idx_04], 3), "\n")
cat("tau^2 = 0.3:  power diff =", round(power_diff_tau[idx_03], 4),
    "| correct power =", round(pow_studentized_tau[idx_03], 3),
    "| incorrect power =", round(pow_standard_tau[idx_03], 3), "\n")
cat("Most negative distortion at tau^2 =", round(tau2_seq[idx_min], 3),
    "| power diff =", round(power_diff_tau[idx_min], 4), "\n")

# --- Scenario Table ---
compute_scenario <- function(p_i, sigma_ratio, n_i, beta_i, E_r2_base){
  sigma0   <- E_r2_base / (p_i * sigma_ratio + (1 - p_i))
  sigma1   <- sigma_ratio * sigma0
  E_W2_i   <- p_i * (1 - p_i)
  E_r2_i   <- p_i * sigma1 + (1 - p_i) * sigma0
  E_W2r2_i <- p_i * (1-p_i)^2 * sigma1 + (1-p_i) * p_i^2 * sigma0
  tau2_i   <- E_W2r2_i / (E_W2_i * E_r2_i)
  
  pow_studentized <- 1 - pnorm(z_a - beta_i * p_i*(1-p_i) / sqrt(E_W2r2_i / n_i))
  pow_standard    <- 1 - pnorm((z_a * sqrt(E_W2_i * E_r2_i) -
                                  beta_i * p_i*(1-p_i)*sqrt(n_i)) / sqrt(E_W2r2_i))
  mde_studentized <- (z_a + z_b) * sqrt(E_W2r2_i) / (p_i * (1-p_i) * sqrt(n_i))
  mde_standard    <- (z_a * sqrt(E_W2_i * E_r2_i) + z_b * sqrt(E_W2r2_i)) /
                       (p_i * (1-p_i) * sqrt(n_i))
  n_studentized   <- (z_a + z_b)^2 * E_W2r2_i / (beta_i * p_i * (1-p_i))^2
  n_standard      <- ((z_a * sqrt(E_W2_i * E_r2_i) + z_b * sqrt(E_W2r2_i)) /
                        (beta_i * p_i * (1-p_i)))^2
  
  return(data.frame(
    tau2     = round(tau2_i, 3),
    pow_diff = round(pow_standard - pow_studentized, 3),
    mde_diff = round(mde_standard - mde_studentized, 0),
    n_diff   = round(n_standard - n_studentized, 0)
  ))
}

scenario_params <- list(
  list(p_label = "0.5", ratio_label = "1.0", p = 0.5, ratio = 1),
  list(p_label = "0.5", ratio_label = "2.0", p = 0.5, ratio = 2),
  list(p_label = "0.3", ratio_label = "1.0", p = 0.3, ratio = 1),
  list(p_label = "0.3", ratio_label = "2.0", p = 0.3, ratio = 2),
  list(p_label = "0.1", ratio_label = "1.0", p = 0.1, ratio = 1),
  list(p_label = "0.1", ratio_label = "2.0", p = 0.1, ratio = 2),
  list(p_label = "0.1", ratio_label = "0.5", p = 0.1, ratio = 0.5)
)

scenario_list <- lapply(scenario_params, function(s){
  res <- compute_scenario(s$p, s$ratio, n, beta_long, E_r2)
  data.frame(p = s$p_label, sigma_ratio = s$ratio_label,
             tau2 = res$tau2, pow_diff = res$pow_diff,
             mde_diff = res$mde_diff, n_diff = res$n_diff)
})

lalonde_row <- data.frame(
  p           = "0.416",
  sigma_ratio = "--",
  tau2        = round(tau2, 3),
  pow_diff    = round(pow_standard - pow_studentized, 3),
  mde_diff    = round(mde_standard - mde_studentized, 0),
  n_diff      = round(n_standard - n_studentized, 0)
)

scenarios_df <- bind_rows(scenario_list, lalonde_row)
print(scenarios_df)

# --- Print LaTeX table ---
cat("\\begin{table}[H]\n")
cat("\\centering\n")
cat("\\caption{Distortion between unstudentized and studentized test across scenarios.\n")
cat("$\\Delta$ Power, $\\Delta$ MDE, and $\\Delta n^*$ are defined as unstudentized minus studentized.\n")
cat("Positive values indicate the unstudentized test overstates relative to the studentized test.\n")
cat("All scenarios use $n = 445$, $\\hat{\\beta}_{\\text{long}} = 1606$, and $\\alpha = 0.05$.}\n")
cat("\\label{tab:scenarios}\n")
cat("\\begin{tabular}{cccccc}\n")
cat("\\toprule\n")
cat("$p$ & $\\sigma_1/\\sigma_0$ & $\\tau^2$ & $\\Delta$ Power & $\\Delta$ MDE & $\\Delta n^*$ \\\\\n")
cat("\\midrule\n")
for(i in 1:nrow(scenarios_df)){
  if(i == 8) cat("\\midrule\n")
  cat(paste0(scenarios_df$p[i], " & ", scenarios_df$sigma_ratio[i], " & ",
             scenarios_df$tau2[i], " & ", scenarios_df$pow_diff[i], " & ",
             scenarios_df$mde_diff[i], " & ", scenarios_df$n_diff[i], " \\\\\n"))
}
cat("\\bottomrule\n")
cat("\\end{tabular}\n")
cat("\\end{table}\n")

```
